holdings.infoBox: VSMV is an equity ETF with a total of 62 individual holdings. The top holdings are Apple stock at 10.49%, Lam Research at 5.93%, KLA Corporation at 5.47%, QUALCOMM at 5.20%, and Walmart at 3.68%.

overview.description: The VictoryShares US Multi-Factor Minimum Volatility ETF (VSMV) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund tracks an index of large- and mid-cap US stocks, selected and weighted based on multiple factors. ETF optimization and constraints are used in order to minimize volatility. VSMV was launched on Jun 22, 2017 and is issued by VictoryShares.
infoTable: Nasdaq Victory Multi-Factor Minimum Volatility Index

data.title: Target stock's best day in 9 months boosts retail EFTs
data.text: Exchange-traded funds with big holdings in Target Inc. TGT, +12.19% outperformed Wednesday after the retailer reported quarterly results that blew away expectations.
